title: CJI Surya Kant writes to High Courts, urges them to appoint more women judges
description: Chief Justice of India (CJI) Surya Kant has written to Chief Justices of all High Courts urging them to prioritise women candidates in judicial appointments. Sources familiar with the development told Bar & Bench that after the letter, most courts have responded in the affirmative.The letter, sent last week, comes at a time when representation of women in the higher judiciary remains low.
